---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case for this feature.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or additional context.

## Checklist

- [ ] This feature aligns with lifeOS principles (privacy-first, self-hosted, no external services)
- [ ] I've checked that no similar feature request exists
